description_long: This is a digital representation of an adult woman standing with arms extended horizontally in a T-pose. She has a curvy build and is wearing a two-piece bikini with a classic cut, revealing her midriff, arms, and legs. Her hair is styled in voluminous, shoulder-length waves, and her facial features are clearly defined. The figure is barefoot, with toes and fingers individually modeled. The skin surface appears smooth and the overall form is anatomically proportionate, with attention to muscle and body contours. No accessories or carried objects are visible.
description: A detailed adult female figure in a T-pose, wearing a bikini and barefoot, with shoulder-length wavy hair and a smooth, realistic body surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, chest, and full frontal body details with arms outstretched.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, chest, and the side contour of the body and limbs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back, hair, and the back of the legs and arms.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, chest, and the side contour of the body and limbs.
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
